div.head: Paramādya-tantra
div.p:
p.1
paramādya-tantra
mahāsukhavajraguhya
anādinidhanaḥ sattvo vajrasattvo mahārataḥ/ samantabhadra sarvātmā( =tvam asi) vajragarvā patiḥ patiḥ//
virāgasadṛśam pāpam anyaṁ nāsti tridhātuke( =svabhāvataḥ)/ tasmāt kāmavirāgitvaṁ nakāryaṁ bhavatā punaḥ //
athāsya sādhanaṁ vakṣye siddhim atyantaśāśvatīm/ yenāpnoti bhavehaiva siddhim atyantaśāśvatīm//
p.2
(sarvabuddhasamāyoga)
vajrasattvasaṇgrahād vajraratnam anuttaram/ vajradharmagāyanaiś ca / vajrakarmakaro bhava//
divyaratnaprabhodyota bhūṣitāmalatejasi// caturasre caturdvāre niryūhapratimaṇḍite/ vedikāsu parikṣipta vajrāpsaragaṇārcite// ardhacandrapratiṣṭhāna- vajraratnakarojjvale/ mārutoddhūtaviśvāgra patākā ghaṇṭanādito// hārādarśamahāpuṣpa- sragḍāmābharaṇābhṛte/
p.3
mahāsukha(=vajra)vimāne tu vijahāra mahāsukha[ḥ]// (trisamayarājatantra-ṭīkā) anādinidhanaḥ sattvo vajrasattvo mahārataḥ/ samantabhadra sarvātmā vajragarvā patiḥ patiḥ// yac cittaṁ sarvasattvānāṁ dṛḍhatvāt sattva ucyate/ samādhānād vajrasamo(=samādhis tu) niścayair yāti vajratām// sattvādhiṣṭhānayogena vajrasattvaḥ punar bhavet/
p.4
svacittaparativedhādi buddhabodhir yathāvidhiḥ/ tathāgatakulaṁ smṛtam(=mahat)/ saiva padmakulaṁ śuddhaṁ saivoktaṁ maṇisatkulam// saiva rāgo virāgaś ca kāmamokṣa bhavaty api/ trikālas tribhavas tryagras trilokas tu tridhātukaḥ// (sarvabyddgasanātiga) sarvānurāgasukhasatmanasa/
p.5
tvaṁ vajrasattva paramasurata/ bhava me mahāsukhadṛḍhoccrayada/ pratipadya siddhya ca laghu praṇata// sagarvaṁ vajram ullālya vajragarvaṁ samudvahan/ kāyavākcittavajrais tu vajrasattvaḥ svayaṁ bhavet// mahāsukhavajraguhye kalparāje avikalpāt samādhis tu sattvārthaparikalapanāt/ tena kalpaḥ samākhyāta[ḥ] kalpanā pariśuddhayā//
p.6
(āmnāyamañjarī) tathāgatakulaṁ saiva saiva vajrakulaṁ smṛtam(=mahat)/ saiva padmakulaṁ śuddhaṁ saivoktaṁ maṇisatkulam// sattvārthahetor na ca karmaśuddher jināḥ prakurvanti viśodhanāni/ na vighnam atrāsti na caiva nārāḥ kalpe na cāsiddhir avṛddhyadhiṣṭhitā// na māratāṁ yāmi na cādṛḍhatvaṁ dṛḍhatvahetor na ca śāsayāni/ dṛḍhībhavāmy āśu varāgrabodhaye yaḥ sādhayen māṁ svasukhair na duḥkhair//
p.7
(viṁśatividhi=sarvabuddhasamāyogo) athādyabhuvane ramye sarvākāśapratiṣṭhite/ divyaratnaprabhodyota- bhūṣitāmalatejasi// caturasre caturdvāre niryūhapratimaṇḍite/ vedikāsu parikṣipta- vajrāpsaragaṇārcite// ardhacandrapratiṣṭhāna- vajraratnakarojjvale/ mārutoddhūtaviśvāgra- patākā ghaṇṭanādito// hārādarśamahāpuṣpa- sragḍāmābharaṇābhṛte/
p.8
mahāsukha(=vajra)vimāne tu vijahāra mahāsukha[ḥ]// (trisamayarājatantra-ṭīkā) anādinidhanaḥ sattvo vajrasattvo mahārataḥ/ samantabhadra sarvātmā vajragarvā patiḥ patiḥ// (viṁśatividhi, vajrāvalī) yac cittaṁ sarvasattvānāṁ dṛḍhatvāt sattva ucyate/ samādhānād vajrasamo(=samādhis tu) niścayair yāti vajratām//
p.9
sattvādhiṣṭhānayogena vajrasattvaḥ punar bhavet/ tathāgatakulaṁ saiva saiva vajrakulaṁ smṛtam/ saiva padmakulaṁ śuddhaṁ saivoktaṁ maṇisatkulam//
p.10
saiva rāgo virāgaś ca kāmamokṣa bhavaty api/ trikālas tribhavas tryagras trilokas tu tridhātukaḥ// (sarvabuddhasamāyoga) yāvad bhavādhiṣṭhāne 'tra bhavanti varasūrayaḥ/ tāvat sattvārtham atulaṁ śākyā kartum anirvṛtāḥ// (nayasūtra) paramādya
p.11
caturdvāraṁ smṛtīndriyaiḥ// catustoraṇavad bhavet/ śūraṇgamakhagañjādi samādhir vedikāḥ smṛtāḥ// vedyāṁ pūjākaravyagra granthādidhāriṇīcayam/ yac citrābharaṇaṁ tasmāt sarvāśāparipūraṇam// vinayoddhūtasaddharma- navāṇgaravasarvagaṁ/ mārutoddhūtaviśvāgra
p.12
patākāghaṇṭānāditaṁ// jñāneṣv ādarśabodhyaṇgaiḥ hārārdhahāracandrārkā- darśasrakcāmarojjvalaṁ// tasya madhye tu yac cakram aṣṭamaṇḍalakopamam/ vimokṣāṣṭakam etad dhi sarvasiddhiprasādhakam// (viṁśatividhi, kriyāsamuccaya) hūṁ mahāsukhavadzrasatva/ yahiśaghum/
p.13
hūṁ mahāsukhavajrasattvāyāhī(sic) śīghra/ he mahāsukhavajrasattvam ā[yā]hi śīghraṁ/ he mahāsukhavajrasattvāyāhi śīghraṁ/ mahāsukhavadzra-amoghaya/ mahāsukhavajra-amoghasamayam/ mahāsukhavajrāmoghasamam/ mahāsukhavajramoghasamayam/ anubālaya/ manupālaya/ manupālaya/ prabuddha prabudhya prabudhya/ prabudhya prabudhya/ prabudhya budhya/ surata te suratas tvaṁ/
p.14
manuragto me bhava/ anurakto me bhava/ m anurakto me bhava/ m anurakto me bhava/ sugatoṣyo me bhava/ sutoṣyo me bhava/ sutoṣyo me bhava/ dridho me bhava/ sudṛḍho me bhava/ suboṣyo me bhava/ supoṣyo me bhava/ supoṣyo me bhava/ bhagavān nanadinasatva/ n anādinidhanasattva/ bhagavann anādinidhanasattva/ bhagavann anādinidhanasattva/ sarvasuddhi me praya/ sarvasiddhi me prayaccasva/
p.15
sarvasiddhi me prayacca eṣa tvā/ ma tri śa ave śya sattvam ākṛṣya praveṣa/ nākṛṣya praveśa/ nākṛṣya praveśa/ samayer baddha/ vaśīkiromi/ samayair baddhvā vaśīkaromi/ samayair bhadhvā vaśīkaromi/ samayair bhadhvā vaśīkaromi/ yimer mutrapade/ imer? mudrāpadaiḥ/ mer? mudrāmantrapadaiḥ/ me mudrāmantrapadaiḥ/ ḍza hūṁ vaṁ ho/ jaḥ hūṁ vaṁ hoḥ/ jaḥ hūṁ vaṁ hoḥ/ jaḥ hūṁ vaṁ hoḥ/
p.16
mahāsukhamahārāga mahāvajra mahādhana/ mahājñāna mahākarma vajrasattvādya siddhaya me// vajrasattvādya siddha me//
p.17
paramādya mahāsattva mahārata mahārati/ samantabhadra sarvātma vajragarva pati[ḥ] pati[ḥ]// citta sattvasamādhyagrya citta sattvasamādhyagra vajravajra mahādhara(=mahodāra)/ vajravajra mahādhana/
p.18
samantabhadra caryāgrya samantabhadra caryāgra māra mārapramardaka// sarvabodhi mahābuddha buddhāgra jaṁmajaḥ/ buddha buddhāgra jaṁmajaḥ/ vajrahūṁkāra hūṁkāra vajrahūṁkāra hūṁkāra vajrahūṁkāra huṁkāra lokeśvara maṇiprada//
p.19
mahārāga mahāsaukhye mahārāga mahāsaukhya kāmamokṣa mahādhana/ trikālatribhavas tryagryas trikālas tribhavas tryagryas strilokāgryas tridhātuka// trilokāgra tridhātuka// sthāvaraprabhavaṁ vyaktaṁ sthāvaraprabhavavyakta susūkṣmasthūlasaṁcaya/
p.20
susūkṣmasthūlasaṁcayaṁ/ jaṁgamapravaraprāpti bhavasaṁsāraśodhaka// bhavasāgaraśodhana// anādinidhanādyata[ḥ] anādinidhanātyanta (=kāṇḍa) prāk sarvaṁ āsthita/ kānta prā[k] sarvasaṁsthita/ kanta prāksarvaṁ āsthita/ kanta prāk sarvam āsthitaḥ/ hṛ[d]mudrā yogasamaya hṛtamudrā yogasamayaḥ hṛdmudrā yogasamayaḥ tattvasatyamahāmahaḥ//
p.21
tathāgata mahāsiddhi tathāgata mahāsiddha tathāgata mahāsiddha dharmakarmamahābuddha(=bhūta)/ saddharmasatkarmapatha(=pati) saddharmasatkarmabhatta bodhicitta subodhakaḥ// bodhicitta subodhaka// bodhicitta subodhaka// vajrakrodha mahākrodha
p.22
jvālāpralayadāmakaḥ/ mahāvinaya duṣṭāgra rudra rudra kṣayaṁkara// sarvaśuddhi mahāpadma prajñopāya mahānaya/ rāgaśuddhisamādhyagrya rāgaśuddhisamādhyagra
p.23
ragaśuddhisamadhyagra viśvarāga maheśvara// ākāśānantanityo vai ākāśānantyanit[y]o vai sarvabhūtamahālaya/ sarvabuddhamahālaya// vibhūtiśrīr vibho rāja vibhūtiśrī vibho rāja vibhūtiśrī vibho rājā sarvāśaparipūrakaḥ//
p.24
namas te 'stu te 'stu/ namo namaḥ bhakto 'haṁ tvāṁ namas te 'stu namo namaḥ/ prapadyāmi bhakto 'haṁ tvaṁ prapadyāmi vajrasattvādya siddhya māṁ// vajrasattvādya siddha māṁ// ya imaṁ stotrarājanaṁ pratyahaṁ prāpravartaya/
p.25
dharmavācaiḥ sakṛdgānaṁ siddhi[r] laghutarābhavī// atha ect siddhayone na prā[k] trisaṁdhyaṁ dine dine/ stutvā sarvarāgani[r]mukta śuddhakṣetreṣu siddhyati//
p.26
sarvaduḥkhaharaṁ nityaṁ sakṛdvārapravartanā/ sarvasiddhiṣu saubhāgyaṁ śrīsampad abhivardhana[ṁ] paramādya hūṁ jaḥ hūṁ vaṁ hoḥ/ mahasukhavajrasatva mahāsukhavajrasattva/ abhiṣekeṇa ḥri abhiṣiñcami/
p.27
abhiṣekeṇa tvām abhiśiñcā[mi]/ sarvavajra adhipatitvaṁ sarvavajrādhipatitve ḍiḍhomedhadha dṛḍho me bhava siddhya/ nāma maste bhagavan mahāvajradhara namas te bhagavaṁ mahāvajradhara/ suratastvaṁ/ suratas tvaṁ/ mahāvajrasatva/ mahāvajrasattva/ oṁ bhurabubasva/ oṁ bhūr bhuva sva[ḥ]/ pramādya idaṁ te nārakaṁ vāri samayātikramaṇād dahet/ samayasaṁrakṣaṇāt siddhiḥ
p.28
piba vajrāmṛtodakam// oṁ sarvatathāgata paramamahāyoga bodhicittam utpādayāmi aśeṣānavaśeṣa sarvasattvadhātu paritrāṇahita sukhottamasiddhinimitam matya[n]tabhāvasaṁsiddhi mahaiścā(śvā)ryādhipatya yāvat sarvottamamahāsiddhi
p.29
mahaiścā(śvā)ryādhiptyāya cetayati/ anādinidhanaḥ satvo vajrasatvo mahārataḥ/ samantabhadra sarvātmā vajragarvā patiḥ patiḥ// (viṁśatividhi, vajrāvali) paramādya svabhāvaśuddho hi bhavaḥ svabhāvair vibhavīkṛtaḥ/ svabhāvaśuddhaiḥ satsattvaiḥ kriyate paramo bhavaḥ// (vajrāvalī) sarvabhogopabhogaiś ca
p.30
sevyamānair yathāsukhaṁ/ svādhidaivatayogena svam ātmānaṁ(=svaparāṁś ca) prapūjayet// paramādya oṁ mahāsukhavajra/ vajra abhiṣakanas(sic) oṁ sarvavajrādhipati tvam/abhiśiñcami/ tvām abhiśiñcāmi/ mahāvajradhara/ mahāvajradhara he vajra nāma vajranamaḥ siddha namaḥ/ siddhya samayas tvaṁ bhūr bhuvaḥ svaḥ/
p.31
paramādya diḍhasutoṣya/ dṛḍhasū(sic)toṣya/ sanaragta/ subosiddha talagu/ suraktasupoṣyo me bhava/ paramādya vajrasatva vajrasattva/ vajraradna/ vajraratna/ vajradharma/ vajradharma/ vajrakarma/ vajrakarma/
p.32
satvavajri sattvavajri/ vajraratne/ vajraratne/ vajrapadmi/ vajrapadmini/ viśavajri/ viśvavajri/ paramādya oṁ ākaromukham sarvadharmaṇāṁ ādyānudpannatvad/ oṁ ākāromukhaṁ/ sarvadharmāṇāṁ/ ādyanutpannatvā[t]/ oṁkāromukhaṁ/ sarvadharmāṇāṁ/ ādyanutpannatvāt/
p.33
paramādya jagannātha buddhabodhisusiddaye/ paramādya om utiṣṭha mahādhibtavajriṇi/ om uttiṣṭha mahādīptavajriṇī/ śīghram udthapaya ḥhūṁ/ śīghram utthāpaya hūṁ/ paramādya oṁ mahāvajrajvalayānalārkayahi ja oṁ mahāvajra[jva]lānalārkāyāhi jaḥ/ sarvavajrakula bravaśaya hūṁ/ sarvavajrakulāni praveśaya hūṁ/
p.34
sarvamutraṁ gaṇān bhandhana trat sarvamudrāgaṇabandhana traṭ/ sarvasamayaṁ sādhaya phaṭ sarvasamayāṁ sādhaya maṭ/ sarvaduṣṭān daha paca bhasmikuru sarvaduṣṭān hana daha paca bhasmīkuru/ mahākrodha agnivajriṇa hūṁ phaṭ/ mahākrodhāgnivajrīṇa hūṁ phaṭ/ ā ā ā ā/ ā ā ā ā/ paramādya
p.35
yathā raktam idaṁ padmaṁ rāga(=raṇga)doṣair na lipyate/ asyāvalokanād eva parameśvaratām jināḥ// (sarvabuddhasamāyoga) paramādya oṁ viśodhaya/ manusaniśuddha mahāsatva/ dhatu(sic) oṁ viśodhaya śuddhe/ sattvadhāto[ḥ] samastva/ ragadisañcaye sarvarāgādisañcaye citame sarvadharmeśyavajranicitame sarvadharmaśajini/ citam me sarvadharmeṣu vajriṇī/
p.36
oṁ sarvvatathāgata avaloki[te]śvara padma hata/ ya oṁ sarvaththāgatāvalokiteśvara/ padmahastāya/ hi śīghrame mā vajra mutra// hi śīghram ime vajramudrāpadair agiśya sabe ākṛṣya praveśya samaye rabadha biśikemi/ samaye sarvadā vaśīkaromi/ ja hūṁ vaṁ ho/ jaḥ hūṁ vaṁ hoḥ/
p.37
śodhaya sarvasādhaya ba mama/ śuddhaya sarvasādhaya/ mahāvajradharastoṁ/ padmaṁ mahāvajradharas tvaṁ/ paramādya oṁ siddha bhūṁ dhu/ oṁ siddhya bhū/ siddha bhuva/ siddhya bhuvaḥ/ siddha sva/ siddhya sva/ siddha mahāvajraratna/ siddha mahāvajraratna/ vā vāṭa ṭa traṁ/ va ca ṭa ṭa trāṁ/
p.38
paramādya oṁ bhūr āyahī jā oṁ bhū āyāhi jaḥ/ bhuva praviśa hūṁ bhuva praviśa huṁ/ sā/ grihna vaṁ sva grihṇa vaṁ/ va va ṭa ṭa siddha ho tre// va va ga ga siddhya hoḥ trāṁ/ paramādya rāgo dveṣaś ca mohaś ca trayaṁ te viṣamaṁ gatāḥ/ viṣatvam upayānty eva viṣamatvena sevitāḥ/ amṛtatvaṁ punar ye ca amṛtatvene sevitāḥ//
p.39
(tattvasiddhi, caryāmelāpakapradīpa) paramādya oṁ vajranārāyaṇa cinda pratihanavajracagtrena ho/ bhagavān vajratathāgata/ ja hūṁ vaṁ ho vajradhara taṁ/ vajratathāgata hūṁ/ oṁ vajranārāyaṇa cinda cinda/ apratihatavajrava(=ca)kriṇa hoḥ/ bhagavan vajratathāgata jaḥ hūṁ vaṁ hoḥ/ vajratathāgata hūṁ// vajrakrodhamahāyoginigaṇiśāra/ mahavajrakūlograbaṇe ho/ bhagavān vajracanḍeśvarāya/ ha ha ha ha hrīḥ vajrakrodhamahāyoginīgaṇeśvara/ mahavajraśūlāgrapāṇe hoḥ/ bhagavān vajracanḍeśvara ā/ ha ha ha ha he/ vajrapadmobhava ho/ bhagavān vajralokiśvare mahābrame siddhya/ oṁ bhur buba sva/ sasti nāma svāhā/ vajradhara hrīḥ/ vajrapadmodbhava hoḥ/ bhagavan vajrāvalokiteśvara mahābrahma/ siddhya oṁ bhūr bhuva svaḥ/ svasti namaḥ svāhā/
p.40
he vajrakusumāyūdha/ sakama me sādhaya ho/ bhagavān vajrākāśagarbha/ va va ta ta ṭra/ vajra akagarbha aśeśaṁ mutra/ vajrakusumāyudha/ sarvakāmā me sādhaya ḥoḥ/ bhagavan vajrākāśagarbha/ va va ṭa ṭa ṭrāṁ/ namo yena sādhena/ bhagavati prajñāpāramitā yute/ cinda vajra rina cantrana/ tena satena pāpakan/ oṁ dhi śrī śuti smṛti vijaye svāhā/ vajrabarmi/ namo yena satyena bhagavatī prajñāpāramitā/ sphoṭā cinda vajriṇi cakriṇa/ tena satyena pāpakaṁ/ oṁ dhi śri śroti smṛti vijaye svāhā/ oṁ vajragori mahābhidye trilakavijayeśvari vajrakrodha agnisamaye/ vajradhari namo su te/ tadyathā/ oṁ hilimili lelilāli vajrakamukaye svāhā/ oṁ vajrgauri mahāvidya/ trilokavijayeśvari/ vajrakrodhāgnisamaye/ vajradhāri namo 'stu te/ tadyathā/ hilemile/ lelilalirāli/ vajrakārmukaye svāhā/ vajrasamaya nama yena saddye na bhagavate/ buddhabodhi buddhadhara/ vajradharmaprayogena tenasatena siddha maṁ/ oṁ tare tud tāre ture svā/
p.41
namo yena satyena bhagavati/ buddhabodhir anuttarā/ vajradharmaprayogiṇa/ tena satyena siddhya māṁ/ oṁ tāra tu tāre ture svāhā/ oṁ karmavajrini siddha viśuddhya sadhyavaha/ gaganodbhave/ yogena siddha māṁ paramakare/ tadyathā/ gaganaviśuddhe/ sarvamaviphraya paripuraṇi svāhā/ oṁ kāmavajriṇi siddhāsi/ viśuddhāsi/ gaganodbhavayogina siddhya māṁ/ paramākṣarī/ tadyathā/ gaganodbhava/ gaganaviśuddhe/ sarvāviprāya paripūraṇī svāhā/ paramādya oṁ mahāsuka vajrasatva siddhi hūṁ/ oṁ mahāsukhavajrasattva siddhya hūṁ/ sarvatathāgatan/ samaya ākarśaya jaḥ/ sarvatathāgataṁ samākarṣaya jaḥ/ vajrakuladrīpaṁ/ sarvavajrakulādhipaṁ/
p.42
damayatro praveśaya hūṁ/ damayitvā? praveśaya huṁ/ sarvalokeraraṁ praveśya sarvalokeśvaraṁ praviśya/ samayabandhana vaṁ/ samayair bandhānaya vaṁ/ sarvaradnadvīpaṁ mahāmaṇtrājānaṁ/ sarvaratnādhipaṁ maṇirājānaṁ/ bhaśikuru ho// vaśīkuru hoḥ/ hūṁ āḥ tāṁ hrīḥ ṭraṁ// huṁ āḥ hi hrī traṁ/ paramādya
p.43
tadyathā mahārataśrīvajrāmogharati/ samayā nāma vajriṇī/ samayavajrakelīkilamahārata/ śrīvajrāmogharatisamaya/ vijayavajrā mahāratā/ śrīvajrāmoghāratisamaya/ vajrakāmeśvarā-m-iti/ paramādya
p.44
praviśa bhagavan/ mahāsukhamokṣapuraṁ/ sarvasiddhisukhālayaṁ/ paramasukhātmasiddhyā/ jaḥ hūṁ vaṁ hoḥ rab tu grub par mdzad// jaḥ hūṁ vāṁ vāṁ hoḥ prasiddhyasva// paramādya oṁ paramasukhāśaya/ paramasukhāśaya/ paramasukhāśaya/ salalita vilāsanamitai[r]/ salalitavilāsanamitair/
p.45
namāmi bhagavantaṁ/ rnamāmi bhagavantaṁ/ rnamāmi bhagavantaṁ/ jaḥ hūṁ vaṁ hoḥ hi hi hi hi jaḥ hūṁ vaṁ hoḥ/ hi hi hi hi/ pratīcca kusumāñjali nātha/ pratīcca kusumāñjalir nātha/ paramādya oṁ paramasukhāśaya/ paramasukhāśaya/ salalitavilāsanamitai[r] salalita/ vilāsanamitair
p.46
namāmi bhagavantam/ rnamāmi bhagavantam/ jaḥ hūṁ vaṁ hoḥ jaḥ hūṁ vaṁ hoḥ/ hi hi hi hi hi hi hi hi/ pratīcca pratīcca/ kusumāñjali nātha/ kusumāñjalir nātha/ paramādya oṁ sarvabuddhavararatnasaṁcayaḥ/
p.47
pratyo(=dī)ptadivyamakuṭāya nama[ḥ]/ abhiśiñca māṁ/ pravaravajradharaṁ/ śrīvajrasattva samayas tvam ahaṁ/ paramādya vajraṁ tattvena saṁgrāhya ghaṇṭāṁ dharmeṇa vādya ca/ samayena mahāmudrām adhiṣṭhāya hṛdā japet// paramādya
p.48
sarvatathāgata-uttamasiddhyākarṣaṇa/ paramarahasyasamaya/ vajragītyupahāra jaḥ/ paramādyavajradhara/ vajrasattva satsukhaṁ prabuddhya/ suratas tvam ahaṁ/ pratibuddhya buddha hi hūṁ/ varavajrakarma paramākṣara/
p.49
akṣayobhava/ prasiddhisukhasaumanasya/ samayādya siddhya māṁ vaṁ/ paramāsadmūrtidhara/ sarvayogavijayoccraya/ pravaraśuddhisukhe bhava/ padmarāja he ho/ pravaraparaṁ parama sarvasiddhiparameśvara/
p.50
prabhavahi khagarbha/ satataṁ sam[v]ṛdhya? me/ jaḥ hūṁ vaṁ hoḥ/ hulu hulu/ siddhya samākarṣatu/ mahāsamaye/ sarvatathāgatasamaya/ suratas tvam ahaṁ/ paramādya
p.51
sarvānurāga sukhasanmanasaṁ/ sarvānurāga sukhasadmanasaṁ/ tvaṁ vajrasattva surata/ tvaṁ vajrasattva paramaḥ surata[ḥ]/ tvaṁ vajrasattva paramaḥ surataḥ/ samayaṁ bhava me/ bhava me/ bhava me/ mahāsukhadṛḍhoccrayadaḥ/ mahāsukhadṛḍhoccrayadaḥ/ pratipadya siddhya ca/
p.52
laghu praṇata/ paramādya oṁ ākāśotpādacihnatvād anādinidhanaparam/ mahāvajrasa mayasattvai[r] vajrasattva prasiddhya me// sarvottama mahāsiddhi mahaiśvaryādhidaivata/
p.53
sarvavajradharo rājā siddhya me paramākṣara// nirdoṣaḥ śāśvataś cāsi sarvarāgānurāgaṇa/ tattvena siddhya bhagavan mahārāga mahārata// atyantaśu śuddha sarvāgra ādimuktas tathāgata[ḥ]/
p.54
samantabhadra sarvātmā bodhisattva prasiddhya me// sarvottama mahāsiddhir mahaiśvaryā(=dhidaivatā/) mahaiśvaryāgramudrayā/ siddhya vajramahotkarṣa vajragarva pate mama// paramādya tasmād yatheṣṭavyāpārī sarvabhuk sarvakṛt tathā/
p.55
yathākāmakriyācārī yathābhuvi tathaiveṣṭitaḥ// sarvabuddhasamāyoga utthito vā niṣaṇṇo vā caṁkramaṁ vā yathāsthitaḥ/ prahasan vā prajalpan vā yatra tatra yathā tathā// sarvabuddhasamāyoga paramādya rahasye parame ramye sarvātmani sadā sthitaḥ/ sarvabuddhamayaḥ sattvo vajrasattvaḥ paraṁ sukham// sarvabuddhasamāyoga
p.56
anādinidhanaḥ sattvo vajrasattvo mahārataḥ/ samantabhadraḥ sarvātmā vajragarvā patiḥ patiḥ// asau svayambhūr bhagavān eka evādhidaivataḥ/ sarvabuddhasamāyoga paramādya oṁ sarvayogacidtaṁ upadayami/ oṁ sarvayogikāyavākcittam utpādayāmi/ oṁ sarvayogacittam utpādayāmi/
p.57
utpādayitvā paramāṁ bodhicittam anuttara[ṁ]/ vajramadhyasya pratiṣṭhāpyaṁ hṛdaye hṛdayena tu/ suratasamayastom ho/ surate samayas tvaṁ ho[ḥ]/ vajrasiddhya yathāsukhaṁ/ paramādya idaṁ te nārakaṁ vāri samayātikramaṇād dahet/ samayasaṁrakṣaṇāt siddhiḥ piba vajrāmṛtodakam// paramādya
p.58
oṁ sarvatathāgata oṁ sarvatathāgata/ mahāsamaya mahāsamaya/ adhipatis tvaṁ/ abhiṣiñcāmi tat tvām [a]dhipatitvām abhiṣiñcāmi/ mahāvajradhara mahāvajradhara/ idam tat sarvabuddhatvaṁ/ vajraṁ vajradharasya tu/ tvayāpi hi sadā dhāryaṁ/ mahāvajradharaṁ vratam iti//
p.59
tad idan tat sarvatathāgata/ paramamahābodhicittam/ m asyāparityāgād/ dasya sadā dhāraṇam iti rahasyaṁ/ oṁ vajrakarmavādhidhi he vajragarvādhipati/ śrī vajra nāma siddha samayas tvaṁ śrīhevajra nāma siddhya samayas tvaṁ/ bhur bhuva sva/ bhūr bhuvaḥ svaḥ/ paramādya
p.60
anādinidhanasattvaḥ vajrasattvo mahārataḥ/ samantabhadraḥ sarvātmā vajragarvā patiḥ patiḥ// savabhāvaśuddho hi bhavaḥ svabhāvair vibhavīkṛtaḥ/ svabhāvaśuddhaiḥ satsattvaiḥ kriyate paramo bhavaḥ//
p.61
sarvayogo(=bhogo)pabhogaiś ca sevyamānai[r] yathāsukhaṁ/ svādhidaivatayogena svam ātmānaṁ prapūjayet// (subhāṣitasaṁgraha,mūlasūtra=sarvabuddhasamāyoga) paramādya anatikramaṇīyais tu tathā sarvatathāgatāḥ// mudrā hi samayaḥ prokto manomūrtidṛḍhatvataḥ// paramādya
p.62
yāvad bhavādhiṣṭhāne 'tra bhavanti varasūrayaḥ/ tāvat sattvārtham atulaṁ śākyā kartum anirvṛtāḥ// (nayasūtra) paramādya oṁ eṣo 'haṁ vyākaromi tvāṁ vajrasattvas tathāgataḥ/ bhavadurgatayoddhṛtya atyantabhavasiddhaye// (viṁśatividhi, vajravalī,vidhi) he vadzra namaḥ tathāgata he vajranāma tathāgata/
p.63
siddha samayas tvaṁ siddhya samayas tvaṁ/ bhur buba sva/ bhūr bhuva svaḥ/ (vajrāvalī,vidhi) paramādya dṛṣṭvā praviṣṭvā paramaṁ rahasyottamamaṇḍalaṁ/ sarvapāpair vinirmuktā bhavanto 'dyaiva susthitāḥ// (sang hyang kamahāyānikam, vajrāvalī, kriyāsamuccaya, vidhi) na bhūyo maraṇan tvāsti yānād asmān mahasukhāt/ adhṛṣyāś cāpy avadhyāś ca ramadhvam akutobhayāḥ// (sang hyang kamahāyānikam, viṁśatividhi, vidhi)
p.64
nivṛtaṁ bhavadukhaṁ vo 'tyantabhavaśuddhaye(=siddhaye)/ sambhūtāḥ śāsinām agrā atyantabhavasiddhaye// (vidhi) ayaṁ vaḥ satataṁ rakṣyaḥ siddhaḥ samayasaṁvaraḥ/ sarvabuddhasamaṁ proktā ājñā pāramaśāsvatī// (sang hyang kamahāyānikam, viṁśatividhi, vidhi) bodhicittaṁ na vai tyājyaṁ yad vajram iti mudrayā/ yasyotpādanamātreṇa buddha eva na saṁśayaḥ// saddharmo na pratikṣepyo na ca tyājyaḥ kadācana/ ajñānād vātha mohād vā
p.65
na vai vivṛṇuyāt sa tu// (sang hyang kamahāyānikam, vidhi) svam ātmānaṁ parityājya tapobhir na ca pīḍayet/ yathāsukhaṁ sukhaṁ dhāryaḥ sambuddho 'yam anāgataḥ// (sang hyang kamahāyānikam, vidhi) vajraṁ ghaṇtā ca mudrā ca na ca tyājyā kadācana/ ācāryo nāvamantavyaḥ sarvabuddhasamo hy asau// (sang hyang kamahāyānikam, viṁśatividhi, vidhi) yaś cāvamanyetācaryaṁ sarvabuddhasamaṁ gurum/ sarvabuddhāpamānena sa nityaṁ duḥkham āpnuyāt// (sang hyang kamahāyānikam,viṁśatividhi,vidhi)
p.66
jvarair garair viṣai rāgair ḍākinyupadravair grahaiḥ/ vighnair vināyakair ghorair nārito narakaṁ vrajet// (vidhi) tasmāt sarvaprayatnena vajrācaryaṁ mahāgurum(=matim)/ praccannavarakalyāṇaṁ nāvamanyet kādacana// (sang hyang kamahāyānikam, vidhi, gurupañcāśikā) anurūpaṁ ca te deyaṁ gurubhaktaṁ sadakṣiṇam/ tato jvarādayas tāpā na bhūyaḥ prabhavanti hi// (vidhi) nityaṁ svasamayācāryaṁ prāṇair api nijair bhajet/ adeyaiḥ putradārair vā kiṁ punar vibhavaiś calaiḥ// (sang hyang kamahāyānikam)
p.67
yasmāt sudurlabhaṁ tattvaṁ kalpāsaṁkhyeyakoṭibhiḥ/ buddhatvam udyogavate dadātīhaiva janmani// (sang hyang kamahāyānikam, viṁśatividhi) nityaṁ svasamayaḥ sādhyo nityaṁ pūjyās tathāgatāḥ/ nityañ ca gurave deyaṁ sarvabuddhasamo hy asau// (sang hyang kamahāyānikam, viṁśatividhi, vidhi, gurupañcāśikā) datte 'smai sarvabuddhebhyo dattaṁ bhavati śāvatam/ taddānāt puṇyasambhāraḥ sambhārāt siddhir uttamā// (sang hyang kamahāyānikam, vidhi, gurupañcāśikā) adya vaḥ saphalaṁ janna yad asmin supratiṣṭhitāḥ/ samāḥ samayadevānāṁ bhavitāstha na saṁśayaḥ//
p.68
(sang hyang kamahāyānikam,vidhi) adyābhiṣiktā yuṣmantaḥ sarvabuddhaiḥ savajribhiḥ/ traidhātukamhārājāḥ rājādhipatayaḥ sthirāḥ// (sang hyang kamahāyānikam,vidhi) adya mārāṁ vinirjitya praviṣṭāḥ paramaṁ puraṁ/ prāptam adyaiva buddhatvaṁ bhavadbhir nātra saṁśayaḥ// (sang hyang kamahāyānikam,viṁśatividhi,vidhi) paramādya sarvakāmopabhogais tu ramadhvam akutobhayāḥ/ mā bhaiṣīr nāsti te pāpaṁ samayo duratikramaḥ// (sarvabuddhasamāyoga)
p.69
paramādya iti kuruta manaḥ prasādavajraṁ svasamayan akṣayasaukhyadaṁ bhajadhvaṁ/ jagati laghusukhe 'dya vajrasattva pratisamaśāśvatatāṁ gatā bhavantaḥ// (sang hyang kamahāyānikam, vidhi, kriyāsamuccaya) paramādya yad yan maṇḍalaṁ sev[ay]ed viśvamudropahārataḥ/ tat tac ciṣyagaṇaiḥ sarvaiḥ pūjayan(=jāpayan) tu mahāpayet//
p.70
anenopahāravidhinā sarvapāpair vimucyate/ vardhate sarvapuṇyais tu rakṣā bhavati śāśvatī// (sarvabuddhasamāyoga) jvarā viṣā garā rogā ḍākinyopadravā grahāḥ/ mārā vināyakāś caiva praśamaṁ yānty anena hi// (sarvabuddhasamāyoga) siddhyaḥ saṁpadaś caiva ratayaḥ patayas tathā/ sidhyate paramā mudrā(=paramo yogaḥ) sarvabuddhatvam uttamam// (sarvabuddhasamāyoga) paramādya
p.71
sarvānurāgasukhasaumanasam tvaṁ/ sarvānurāgasukhasadmanasam tvaṁ/ vajrasattva suratasamaya bhavāmi/ mahāsukhadṛḍhoccrayada?/ pratipadya siddhya ca laghu praṇata// pratipadya siddhi ca laghu praṇata//
p.72
vajrasattvasaṇgrahād vajraratnam anuttaram/ vajradharmagāyanaiḥ/ vajrakarmakaro bhava// hūṁ vajrakārmuka(=ke)śvarāya namāḥ/
p.73
śrīvajrarāgasamayāya namaḥ/ khaṭvāṁgavajrap[r]alayāya namaḥ/ śrīvajraghaṇṭākalaśāya? nama[ḥ]// kvacid abhirudraraudratanum/ ugrajanāsu harī prapadyasi kvacid abhitīkṣṇacakradharamūrti jagadhiraya?saṁtata[ḥ]/
p.74
kvacid abhi(=ati)saumyaśāntavapur akṣaranam kamalāsanasya vai// kvacid abhi(=ati)dīptakāmasamayā prasiddhya mama padmarāja hi/ sarvābhiṣekaparameśvarata[ḥ]/ saṁsiddhya cākṣayanidhi/ paramasarvāgraketu/ vijayoccrayata[ḥ]/ śrīvajraratna bhava me sukhada//
p.75
bhūr bhuva sva[ḥ]/ hri hūṁ śrī bhyo/ phu phu/ sarvmagamaṇḍalam idaṁ sarvārghamaṇḍalam idam/ vajradharākrama vajradharākrama/
p.76
vemardha vikira vimardha vikira vikira/ bhanja udsvadhaya/nāśaya bhañjoccādaya nāśaya/ hana daha patsa hana daha paca/ bhasmikuru krodha bhasmīkuru krodha/ hūṁkāramantrina/ hūṁkāramantriṇāṁ/ kecid amalendumaṇḍalasahasasrarucyā vapuṣā virājasī/
p.77
pralayānalārkakoṭikarapuñjamahābhayadīptena kecit/ kecid avikāti?dīptisukhaśāntamanādija(=manojaji)narūpadhāriṇā sarvajagatsamārpitasurūpabhṛtādharapāṇinā kecit/ gagaṇam iva sarvasaṁsiddhe tu jagatam vinayo(')dya tu viśuddhanāya/ tvaṁ vajrasattva siddhya mayy aśeṣavinayavidagdhasatsukhebhyaḥ/ oṁ praviśa bhagavan/
p.78
mahāsukhamokṣapuram/ sarvasiddhisukhaparamaramyam/ paramasukottamasiddhyā/ jaḥ hūṁ vaṁ hoḥ prasiddhyasva/ paramādya tattvena bhagavan tu hi bodhisattvas tathāgataḥ/ durdṛṣṭinām hitārthāya
p.79
nirvṛtiṁ darśayantyami(=tu me) aśeṣavinayodyoga dṛḍhaniścayavarmitā/ atyantabhavavāsāgra nibaddhakavacādaya[ḥ]// triratnatām upagatā buddhadharmagaṇā iti/ atyantabhavasaṁsiddha
p.80
viśuddhaśrīkarāparā// iti sarvatathāgataparamaguhyavajraṁ/ atha paramaguhyadharmatāghaṇṭā ākāśalakṣaṇam sarvam ākāśam cāpy alakṣaṇam/ ākāśasamatāyogā[t] sarvāgrasamatā sphuṭeti//
p.81
prajñāpāramitā/ atha mahāsamaya[saṁ]varam iti/ sarvabhogopabhogais tu sevyamānai[ḥ] svam ātmanaṁ/ triratnapūjā paramā karomīti vadām aham// iti paramādya [dyata] rāgodbhavakrodha vajrāgniskandhamūrttaya/
p.82
pradīptavajramahāyoga ḍākinyā sarvato jvala iti vajraṁ/ atha dharma ākāśalakṣaṇaṁ sarvam ākāśanñ cāpy alakṣaṇam/ ākāśasamatāyogī
p.83
sarvam evātra sādhaye// sarvākāśāgrayogena sarvākāśam iti bruvan/ mudritaṁ vajramudrābhi[ḥ] trilokam api bhakṣayed iti// paramādya evam ādyair anantāgraiḥ dharmadhātusamāsamaiḥ/ ākāśadhātuparyantair(=dhātvasaṁkhyeyair) vajrasūryodayo bhavet// (sarvabuddhasamāyoga) paramādya
p.84
mahāraktaṁ sakarpūraṁ raktacandanayojitam/ gaṇamadhye pratiṣṭhan tu sarvāntiṣṭharasāyanam// anāmāṇguṣṭhavakrābhyāṁ svādhidevatātma(=sarvākāśapra)yogavān/ somapānavad āśvādya siddhim āpnoti śāśvatīṁ// (sarvabuddhasamāyoga) sarvabhogopabhogaiś ca sevyamānair yathāsukhaṁ/ (sarvabuddhasamāyoga) [sarvākāśāgrayogena] [sarvasiddhim avāpnuyāt//] paramādya ayan vaḥ satataṁ rakṣyaḥ siddhaḥ samayasamvaraḥ/ sarvabuddhaiḥ samaṁ proktā
p.85
ājñā paramaśāśvatī// (sang hyang kamahāyānikam, viṁśatividhi,vidhi) paramādya nityaṁ svasamayaḥ sādhyo nityaṁ pūjyās tathāgatāḥ/ intyañ ca gurave deyaṁ// (sang hyang kamahāyānikam, viṁśatividhi, vidhi,gurupañcāśikā) datte 'smin sarvabuddhebhyo dattaṁ bhavati cākṣayaṁ/ taddānāt puṇyasambhāraḥ sambhārāt siddhir uttamā// (sang hyang kamahāyānikam,vidhi, gurupañcāśikā) adya vaḥ saphalaṁ janna yad asmin supratiṣṭhitāḥ/ samāḥ samayadevānām(=rājānām)// (sang hyang kamahāyānikam, vidhi)
p.86
adyābhiṣiktā yuṣmantaḥ sarvabuddhiḥ savajribhiḥ/ traidhātukamahārājyaṁ// (sang hyang kamahāyānikam, vidhi) paramādya tattvena bhagavān buddha avalokiteśvaraḥ/ karoti vinayopāya śuddhikrīḍā pranartita// iti paramaṁ vajram/
p.87
yathā raktaṁ hi kamalaṁ rāgadoṣair na lipyate/ rvāsadoṣār bahuvidhais stathā śuddhaṁ tridhātukam// m iti paramaguhyadharmatā/ ghaṇṭā yena yenaiva vidhinā jagadhi(=dvi)nayam āvahe/
p.88
padmaśuddhyagrayogātmā tena tenaiva śuddhyed iti// paramādya anatikramaṇīyais tu tathā sarvatathāgatāḥ// mudrā hi samayaḥ prokto manomūrtidṛḍhatvataḥ// (vajrāvalī) paramādya ātmā vai sarvabuddhatvaṁ sarvaśauritvam eva ca/ svādhidaivatayogena tasmād ātmaiva sādhyet(=kalpayet)// (sarvabuddhasamāyoga pāda ab=vajrasattvasādhana)
p.89
paramādya
sarvabhogopabhogaiś ca sevyamānair yathāsukhaṁ/ svādhidaivatayogena svam ātmānaṁ prapūjayet// (subhāṣitasaṁgraha,mūlasūtra=sarvabuddhasamāyoga) paramādya mano(=mudrā)mūrtidṛḍhatvāc ca sarva(=saiva)saukhyaṁ dṛḍhībhavet/ dūḥkhaiś calatvam āyāti nirodhaṁ vāpi gaccati// (tattvasiddhi) paramādya
p.90
sasarvabhogopabhogaiś ca sevyamānair yathāsukhaṁ/ svādhidaivatayogena svam ātmānaṁ(=svaparāṁś ca)prapūjayet// (subhāṣitasaṁgraha, mūlasūtra=sarvabuddhasamāyoga) paramādya duṣkarair niyamais tīvraiḥ mūrtiḥ śuṣyati duḥkhitā/ duḥkhād vikṣipyate cittaṁ vikṣepāt siddhir anyathā// (tattvasiddhi, kriyāsaṁgraha) yatheṣṭaceṣṭā vyāpāraḥ sarvabhuk sarvakṛt tathā/ yathākāmakriyācārī
p.91
yathārucitaceṣṭitaḥ// (sarvabuddhasamāyoga) utthito vā niṣaṇṇo vā caṁkramaṁ vā yathāsthitaḥ/ prahasan vā prajalpan vā yatra tatra yathā tathā// (sarvabuddhasamāyoga) paramādya amaṇḍalapraviṣṭo vā sarvāvaraṇavān api/ svādhidaivatayogātmā mandapuṇyo 'pi siddhyati// (sarvabuddhasamāyoga) anena tattvayogena sādhayet sarvam eva hi/ durbhuktaiḥ duṣkṛtaiḥ sarvaiḥ sarvathā na praduṣyati// (sarvabuddhasamāyoga)
p.92
paramādya sarvānurāgasukhasatmanasa/ tvaṁ vajrasattva paramasurata/ bhava me mahāsukhadṛḍhosra(=ccra)yada/ pratipattya(=padya) siddhya ca laghu praṇata// paramādya oṁ bodhicidtavajre/ oṁ bodhicittavajre//1// oṁ samantabhatre cadye
p.93
oṁ samantabhadracarye//2// oṁ cindhamane/ oṁ cintāmaṇi//3// oṁ anirodhe/ oṁ anirodhe//4// oṁ jativivarte/ oṁ jātivivarte//5// oṁ sarvajñāni oṁ sarvavijñāne//6// oṁ mahārāgadharmate/ oṁ virāgadharmate//7// oṁ vidyākavace/ oṁ vīryakavace//8// (tib)lacking oṁ sarvagāmini//9// oṁ vajratridhacite hūṁ/ oṁ vajradṛḍhacitte hūṁ//10//
p.94
oṁ sarvatathāgata/ oṁ sarvatathāgate//11// oṁ svabhāvaviśuddhāḥ oṁ svabhāvaśuddhadharmatājñānaviśuddhi//12// dharmatajñānaviśuddhe/ oṁ dharmaviśuddhadya(sic)//13// oṁ karmaviśuddhe/ [oṁ karmaviśodhani]//14// hūṁ sumbhavajriṇi phaṭ oṁ vi(=ni)sumbhavajriṇi phaṭ//15// oṁ karmarāge/ oṁ kāmarāge//15// oṁ ja vajraṇi/ oṁ jaḥ vajre//17// oṁ hūṁ sarvadharmani/ oṁ hūṁ sarvadāmadya//18//
p.95
oṁ hrīḥ oṁ hrīḥ//19// oṁ akāromukhaṁ/ oṁ akāramukhe//20// oṁ prajñāpāramitāye/ oṁ prajñāpāramite//21// vaṁ hūṁ/ oṁ oṁ/ [oṁ] aṁ vaṁ hūṁ oṁ aḥ//22// oṁ sarvatathāgatakayagre oṁ sarvatathāgatakāyāgre//23// oṁ sarvatathāgatabhaviśuddhe/ oṁ sarvatathāgatavāgviśuddhe//24// oṁ sarvatathāgatacidtavajra/ oṁ sarvatathāgatacittavajre āḥ//25// paramādya
p.96
sarvottamamahāsiddhi māhaiśvaryādhidaivataḥ/ sarvavajradharo rājā siddhya me paramākṣaraḥ// (vajrāvali) paramādya evam ādyair anantāgraiḥ dharmadhātusamāsamaiḥ/ ākāśadhātuparyantaiḥ// (=uttaratantra paramādya avikalpāt samādhis(=dharmās) tu sattvārthaparikalpanāt/
p.97
tena kalpaḥ samākhyāta[ḥ] kalpanā pariśuddhayā// paramādya ākāśotpādacihnatvād anādinidhanaparam/ mahāvajramayasattvair [vajrasattveti ucyate//] paramādya sarvottama mahāsiddhi mahaiśvaryādhidaivata/ sarvavajradharo rājā siddhya me(=surata)paramākṣaraḥ// paramādya
p.98
ākāśotpādacihnatvād anādinidhanaparam/ mahāvajramayasattvaiḥ [paramādyeti ucyate//] paramādya anādinidhanaḥ sattvo vajrasattvo mahārataḥ/ samantabhadraḥ sarvātmā vajragarvā patiḥ patiḥ// paramādyapuruṣo bhagavān// (vajrāvalī) paramādya
p.99
tasmād yatheṣṭavyāpārī sarvabhuk sarvakṛt tathā/ yathākāmakriyācārī yathārucitaceṣṭitaḥ// (sarvabuddhasamāyoga) utthito vā niṣaṇṇo vā caṁkramaṁ vā yathāsthitaḥ/ prahasan vā prajalpan vā yatra tatra yathā tathā// (sarvabuddhasamāyoga) yad yad indriyamārgatvaṁ yāyāt tat tat svabhāvataḥ/ susamāitayogena// paramādya
p.100
sattvārthahetor na ca karmaśuddher jināḥ prakurvanti viśodhanāni na vighnam atrāsti na caiva mārāḥ kalpe na ca siddhir vṛddhyādhiṣṭhitā// na māratāṁ yāmi na cādṛḍhatvaṁ dṛḍhatvahetor na ca śāayāmi dṛḍhībhavāmy āśu varāgrabodhaye yaḥ sādhayen māṁ svasukhair na duḥkhair// (viṁśatividhi=sarvabuddhasamāyoga)
